response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated work on AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership through workshops, frameworks, and community projects
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI systems; most AI exposure is recent and secondary
Missing clear experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership or cross-team mentoring in enterprise AI contexts
